title: Ability to set Auto Fit or Today option on Dashboards
excerpt: I would like to see the ability to set a Dashboard Gantt widgets default display to either Auto fit or Today. The current functionality always defaults to Today.

posts.author: dhblinn (Douglas Blinn)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to see the ability to set a Dashboard Gantt widgets default display to either Auto fit or Today. The current functionality always defaults to Today.
